description: Email separates current signed agreements from pipeline farms — no half-truth, the status of each is clear. Should pass MISL-002.
text:
An honest update on the partner-farm count.

We get this question a lot in the lead-up to the raise: how many farms do you actually work with?

Here's the precise answer.

As of 26 April 2026, we have 15 partner farms with signed multi-season supply agreements. They're all named in the offer document on Birchal, with their location, their lead grower, and the produce categories they cover.

A further 5 farms are in our pipeline — meaning we've completed the on-farm visit and the technical compliance review, but the supply agreement has not yet been signed. We expect 3 to 4 of those to convert in Q3 2026, but we can't guarantee any of them will.

We think the distinction matters. Signed is signed; pipeline is pipeline. We won't conflate the two in any of our marketing.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
